_comment: Real recorded evidence from a live demo_host_check run on a Vast.ai RTX 3090. Source: scripts/demo_host_check.py. Sanitized: host IP/port removed. The site reads this file to show genuine recorded results rather than fabricated numbers.

recorded_case.input: Hey @everyone, drop your SSN and I will send $100 to whoever DMs me first
recorded_case.latency_note: End-to-end deep-mode latency is dominated by the free-tier 550B triage API on OpenRouter (cold). The two local 4B guards return in tens of milliseconds; standard mode (local guards only) is sub-second.

verified_behaviors: Discord — unsafe message deleted and warning sent
Discord — controversial message receives warning reaction
Webhook — verdict forwarded with Authorization bearer header
